name: Migraine
description: A neurological condition causing severe headaches and other symptoms

name: Type 2 Diabetes
description: A metabolic disorder affecting blood sugar regulation

name: Asthma
description: A chronic respiratory condition affecting airways

name: Celiac Disease
description: An immune reaction to eating gluten

name: Fibromyalgia
description: A condition causing widespread musculoskeletal pain

name: Chronic Fatigue Syndrome
description: A complex disorder characterized by extreme fatigue

name: Multiple Sclerosis
description: A disease affecting the central nervous system

name: Lupus
description: An autoimmune disease affecting multiple body systems

name: Psoriasis
description: A skin condition causing rapid cell buildup

name: Irritable Bowel Syndrome
description: A chronic disorder affecting the large intestine

name: Endometriosis
description: A disorder where tissue grows outside the uterus

name: PCOS
description: Polycystic ovary syndrome affecting hormone levels

name: Anemia
description: A condition with insufficient healthy red blood cells

name: Vertigo
description: A sensation of dizziness and spinning

name: Tinnitus
description: Ringing or buzzing in the ears

name: Glaucoma
description: Eye condition damaging the optic nerve

name: Cataracts
description: Clouding of the eye's natural lens

name: Rosacea
description: A chronic skin condition causing redness

name: Raynaud's Disease
description: A condition affecting blood flow to extremities

name: Restless Leg Syndrome
description: A nervous system disorder causing leg discomfort
